summary: ANDROID 🟥 DFU stuck at 99% on Morpheus devices (VOY5200,VOY8200)
scenario: Language update (DFU) gets stuck at 99% for ~8 minutes on Voyager 5200 Series and Voyager 8200 UC, increasing total update time from 1-2 minutes to 10+ minutes
description_clean: Language update (DFU) gets stuck at 99% for almost 8 minutes on Morpheus devices (Voyager 5200 Series and Voyager 8200 UC), causing the total update time to increase from the expected 1-2 minutes to 10 minutes or more.
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android
Connect to a Morpheus device (Voyager 5200 Series or Voyager 8200 UC)
Observe the update progress bar during the installation
expected: The language update (DFU) completes within 1-2 minutes total, with no prolonged stalling at any percentage point.
actual: The language update (DFU) gets stuck at 99% for almost 8 minutes, causing the total update time to increase to 10 minutes or more.
